events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: the oversized backfill lifts (est. ~18 in. vs. an ~8 in. max loose lift for the compactor on site) mean compaction energy can't reach the bottom of each lift, leaving loose material near the pipe haunch/barrel — a real risk of settlement, pipe deflection, or joint separation once buried. Called this a **fail**, **high risk**, `installed-defective`/`non-compliant`, with corrective actions to remove and re-place backfill in properly sized, verified lifts per IPC 306.2 and project specs before proceeding.
